;;   where X = ({a,d,f,g,h,i,k,m,n,p} ∪ {a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,j,k,m,n,o,p})
;;         Y = ({a,b,c,d,e,g,h,i,k,l,n,o,p} ∪ ({c,f,h,i,k,m,p} ∩ {b,d,f,h,n}))

(define Ysub (I (s "cfhikmp") (s "bdfhn")))

(define A1 (I '(i) (I (I '(b g i m o) '(a b c d f g h j k l n o p)) '(a c d e f g h k m n o))))
;; Part A2: A1 ∪ {a,b,c,e,g,h,i,j,l,m,n,o,p}
(define A2 (U A1 '(a b c e g h i j l m n o p)))
(sort-set A2)

{"value":"(c d e f g h i j k m n o p)"}

arguments.code:
;; C4 = (({a,b,e,f,g,h,i,j,l,n,o} ∩ (({a,b,d,e,g,j,l,n,p} ∪ {a,b,e,h,k,o}) ∩ {a,c,e,f,g,h,j,k,l,m,n,o,p})) ∪ ({b,d,f,k,l,m,p} ∩ {b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,j,k,l,m,o,p}))
(define u1 (U '(a b d e g j l n p) '(a b e h k o)))  ; {a,b,d,e,g,h,j,k,l,n,o,p}
(define i1 (I u1 '(a c e f g h j k l m n o p)))  ; intersect
(define i2 (I '(a b e f g h i j l n o) i1))
(define i3 (I '(b d f k l m p) '(b c d e f g h i j k l m o p)))
(define C4 (U i2 i3))
(sort-set C4)

tool_trace.output: {"value":"(a b d e f g h j k l m n o p)"}

arguments.code:
;; C5 = ((({b,c,d,e,g,h,i,k,l,o,p} ∪ {b,d,f,g,h,k,l,m,n}) ∪ {a,b,c,h,i,j,k,l}) ∪ {a,c,d,e,g,h,i,j,k,l,m,n})
(define C5 (U (U (U '(b c d e g h i k l o p) '(b d f g h k l m n)) '(a b c h i j k l)) '(a c d e g h i j k l m n)))
(sort-set C5)

tool_trace.output: {"value":"(a b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p)"}

(define PartC (I (I C1u C4) C5))

arguments.code:
;; RIGHT = ((((R1 ∪ R2) ∪ R3) ∪ R4) ∪ R5) ∪ R6
;; R1 = {c,h,i,j,k,n,p} ∪ ({b,c,d,e,g,i,l,m,n,o} ∩ {j,l})  = {c,h,i,j,k,n,p} ∪ {l} = {c,h,i,j,k,l,n,p}
;; Then ∪ {n,p}  (still same since n,p in)
;; Then ∪ (({a,d,g,h,i,j,m,n,o,p} ∪ {a,b,d,e,f,g,h,j,l,m,n,o,p}) ∪ {c,k,m})
;; Then ∪ ({a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,j,k,o,p} ∪ {c})
;; Then ∪ ({a,b,c,d,e,f,g,h,i,j,k,m,n,o,p} ∩ (rest))  - doesn't matter since union with big things

(define r1 (U '(c h i j k n p) (I '(b c d e g i l m n o) '(j l))))
(define r2 (U r1 '(n p)))
(define r3 (U r2 (U (U '(a d g h i j m n o p) '(a b d e f g h j l m n o p)) '(c k m))))
(define r4 (U r3 (U '(a b c d e f g h i j k o p) '(c))))
(define r5inner (I '(a b c d e f g h i j k m n o p) (I '(b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) (I '(b d e f h i l m n o p) '(b i k o p)))))
(define RIGHT (U r4 r5inner))
(sort-set RIGHT)

tool_trace.output: {"value":"(a b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p)"}

arguments.code:
(define FINAL (I LEFT RIGHT))
(sort-set FINAL)

arguments.code:
(import (srfi 1))
(define (U . sets) (if (null? sets) '() (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-union eq? acc s)) (car sets) (cdr sets))))
(define (I . sets) (if (null? sets) '() (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-intersection eq? acc s)) (car sets) (cdr sets))))

(define result
  (U
    (I
      (I '(b f h i k n o) '(e k n o p))
      (I '(a c f h l m n p) (I '(a b c d e f g h i j k l m o p)
                               (U (U (I '(b c d e f g h i j k m n o) '(a c d f h i k l m n o p)) '(a d e f g h k m n o p)) '(a b c d e f h i j k l m n p))))
      (I
        (I (U '(p) (I '(a b f i l m) (I '(b d f) '(a b c d e f g i j m n o p))))
           (I (U (I '(a b c e f h j k l m) (I '(n) '(d e g h i j k l m n p)))
                 (I '(a c d g k l m n o) '(b c d f i l n o p)))
              (I (U '(i) '(p)) '(a c d g h l m o))))
        (I '(b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) (I '(a c d f g h i j k l m n) '(a c d e g h i j k l m n p)))))
    (U
      (I
        (I
          (I (U (I '(d i) '(f h l n))
                (U '(a b f h i j k l m n p) (I '(a b c d e f g h i j l m n o p)
                                              (U (U '(b c f g h j l) '(a b c d e f g h j l m n o p)) '(a b c d e g h i j o)))))
             (U '(l n) '(c e f g j k m o p)))
          (I (I (I '(a b d e f h i j k l m n o) (U (U '(d n) '(b c k p)) '(d f g h k l n o p)))
                (I '(c e h p) (U '(p) (U '(l n p) '(a b e f g i l)))))
             (I (U '(h n o) (U '(a b c d e g h i k l m n o p) (I '(a c d e f g i j k l m n o p) '(c d f i j k n))))
                (I '(g h k n) '(n)))))
        (I (U (I '(b c g n) (I '(b c d e f g i k n) '(a b c d e f g h i j k l n o p))) '(b d e f h j k m o))
           (U (U (I '(a d e f i k m) '(a b c e f g h i l m o p)) '(c d e f h i j k l m n o p)) '(a e m n))))
      (I (U (I '(a b c d e f g h k m n o) '(b f h i j k l o)) (U '(n p) '(d f h l p)))
         (I (U (I '(e) '(a b c e f g j k l m o)) '(a b c d e f g h i j l n o p))
            (I '(a b c d e f g h i k l m n p) '(a c d e f g h i j k l m n p))))))
  )
)

(sort result (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b))))

(import (srfi 1))
(define (U . sets) (if (null? sets) '() (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-union eq? acc s)) (car sets) (cdr sets))))
(define (I . sets) (if (null? sets) '() (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-intersection eq? acc s)) (car sets) (cdr sets))))

(define result
  (U
    (I
      (I '(b f h i k n o) '(e k n o p))
      (I '(a c f h l m n p) (I '(a b c d e f g h i j k l m o p)
                               (U (U (I '(b c d e f g h i j k m n o) '(a c d f h i k l m n o p)) '(a d e f g h k m n o p)) '(a b c d e f h i j k l m n p))))
      (I
        (I (U '(p) (I '(a b f i l m) (I '(b d f) '(a b c d e f g i j m n o p))))
           (I (U (I '(a b c e f h j k l m) (I '(n) '(d e g h i j k l m n p)))
                 (I '(a c d g k l m n o) '(b c d f i l n o p)))
              (I (U '(i) '(p)) '(a c d g h l m o))))
        (I '(b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) (I '(a c d f g h i j k l m n) '(a c d e g h i j k l m n p)))))
    (U
      (I
        (I
          (I (U (I '(d i) '(f h l n))
                (U '(a b f h i j k l m n p) (I '(a b c d e f g h i j l m n o p)
                                              (U (U '(b c f g h j l) '(a b c d e f g h j l m n o p)) '(a b c d e g h i j o)))))
             (U '(l n) '(c e f g j k m o p)))
          (I (I (I '(a b d e f h i j k l m n o) (U (U '(d n) '(b c k p)) '(d f g h k l n o p)))
                (I '(c e h p) (U '(p) (U '(l n p) '(a b e f g i l)))))
             (I (U '(h n o) (U '(a b c d e g h i k l m n o p) (I '(a c d e f g i j k l m n o p) '(c d f i j k n))))
                (I '(g h k n) '(n)))))
        (I (U (I '(b c g n) (I '(b c d e f g i k n) '(a b c d e f g h i j k l n o p))) '(b d e f h j k m o))
           (U (U (I '(a d e f i k m) '(a b c e f g h i l m o p)) '(c d e f h i j k l m n o p)) '(a e m n))))
      (I (U (I '(a b c d e f g h k m n o) '(b f h i j k l o)) (U '(n p) '(d f h l p)))
         (I (U (I '(e) '(a b c e f g j k l m o)) '(a b c d e f g h i j l n o p))
            (I '(a b c d e f g h i k l m n p) '(a c d e f g h i j k l m n p)))))))
)

(define (sort-set s) (sort s (lambda (x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y)))))
(define result
  (U (U '(b c d f g i j l m n o p)
        (I '(e) (I '(a c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) '(a b c d e f h j l m n))))
     (I (U (U (U (U '(a b d f g i j k l n p) '(h p))

              (I '(a d e h i j l m n o p) '(b g i k n)))

                         (I (I (U '(d f g m o p) '(b c d e f g h i j k))
                               (I '(e f g h l o) '(g)))
                            (U '(a c g i j k n) '(b e f g h k l))))
                      '(c d e f g h j k l m n o))
                   '(a b c h i j k l o p))
                 (I (U '(a b c d e f h k l m n o p) '(a b d g p))
                    (U (U (I '(a b d e f g h k n o p) '(a b c d e f g h i j k l m n p))
                          (I '(b d f g j k n o) (U (U '(a e i p) '(a d h i j o p)) '(g))))
                       '(a b c d e g h i j k l m n p))))
              (U (U (U (I '(d e f g k m p) '(h)) '(a d e g h i j l n p))
                    (I (I (I (U '(f g h i k l o) '(a b d e f g i m))
                             (U '(e g o p) (I (I '(d) '(a d e m p)) '(a b c e f g h i j k l m n o p))))
                          (I '(a b d e g h l m o p) '(b g k l m)))
                       '(a i j l)))
                 (U (U '(p) '(d e i)) (U '(a c g m) '(a d n))))))
        (I (I (U '(p) '(b c e f g k l m n o))
              (I (I (I '(c d e f i k n o) '(a d e g h i j k l m n o p))
                    (U '(k o p) '(a b d e f g h i j k l m n o p)))
                 (I (U '(d l n) '(b d e g h i j k l p)) '(d j n o))))
           (U (I '(c e f i j k o p) '(d e))
              (I (U '(a d f g h i j k l m n o p) '(o))
                 '(a b e f g h i j m n o p))))))
     (U (U '(d e f h p) '(f h j n))
        (I (U (U '(l n) '(f h k l m p)) '(l m n p))

              (U (I '(a c f j k l o) '(b d f i j)) '(b g o)))))))
(sort-set result)

  (I
    (U (U '(b c d f g i j l m n o p)
          (I '(e) (I '(a c d e f g h i j k l m n o p) '(a b c d e f h j l m n))))
       (I (U (U (U (U '(a b d f g i j k l n p) '(h p))
                   '(b c d e f g h i k l o p))
                (I '(a d e h i j l m n o p) '(b g i k n)))

                                 (I '(e f g h l o) '(g)))
                              (U '(a c g i j k n) '(b e f g h k l))))
                        '(c d e f g h j k l m n o))
                     '(a b c h i j k l o p))
                   (I (U '(a b c d e f h k l m n o p) '(a b d g p))
                      (U (U (I '(a b d e f g h k n o p) '(a b c d e f g h i j k l m n p))
                            (I '(b d f g j k n o) (U (U '(a e i p) '(a d h i j o p)) '(g))))
                         '(a b c d e g h i j k l m n p))))
                (U (U (U (I '(d e f g k m p) '(h)) '(a d e g h i j l n p))
                      (I (I (I (U '(f g h i k l o) '(a b d e f g i m))
                               (U '(e g o p) (I (I '(d) '(a d e m p)) '(a b c e f g h i j k l m n o p))))
                            (I '(a b d e g h l m o p) '(b g k l m)))
                         '(a i j l)))

          (I (I (U '(p) '(b c e f g k l m n o))

    (U (U '(d e f h p) '(f h j n))
       (I (U (U '(l n) '(f h k l m p)) '(l m n p))

(sort LESS? LST) → list
  Form: procedure
  Return a list containing the elements of LST sorted according
  to the comparison procedure LESS?. The input list is not modified.
  Uses a stable merge sort: equal elements preserve their original
  order.
  Parameters:
    LESS? : procedure -- a two-argument comparison predicate
    LST : list
  Returns: list
  Category: lists
  Keywords: sort, order, merge sort, stable, list

(define (mem? x s) (if (null? s) #f (if (eq? x (car s)) #t (mem? x (cdr s)))))
(define (U a b) (let loop ((r a) (x b)) (if (null? x) r (if (mem? (car x) r) (loop r (cdr x)) (loop (cons (car x) r) (cdr x))))))
(define (I a b) (let loop ((r '()) (x a)) (if (null? x) r (if (mem? (car x) b) (loop (cons (car x) r) (cdr x)) (loop r (cdr x))))))
(define (sortset s)
  (let ((order '(a b c d e f g h i j k l m n o p)))
    (let loop ((o order) (acc '()))
      (if (null? o) (reverse acc)
          (if (mem? (car o) s) (loop (cdr o) (cons (car o) acc)) (loop (cdr o) acc))))))
(sortset (U '(a b c) '(c d e)))

arguments.code:
(define (un a b)
  (let loop ((xs b) (acc a))
    (cond ((null? xs) acc)
          ((memq (car xs) acc) (loop (cdr xs) acc))
          (else (loop (cdr xs) (cons (car xs) acc))))))
(define (inter a b)
  (let loop ((xs a) (acc '()))
    (cond ((null? xs) (reverse acc))
          ((memq (car xs) b) (loop (cdr xs) (cons (car xs) acc)))
          (else (loop (cdr xs) acc)))))
(define (sort-set s)
  (sort (lambda (x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y))) s))
(sort-set (inter '(a b c d) (un '(b c) '(d e))))

;; A1
(define A1
  (inter '(a k m)
    (un
      (un '(a b d e f h)
          (un '(a d f g h i j k l m n o p)
              '(a b c d e f g h i j k l n p)))
      '(a b c g i j k l n o p))))

;; B1 left side inner pieces:
;; P1 = {c,d,e,i,l,p} ∪ ({b,j,m,o} ∩ {a,b,e,f,g,h,i,j,k,l,m,o,p})
(define P1
  (un '(c d e i l p)
      (inter '(b j m o) '(a b e f g h i j k l m o p))))

;; P2 = ({a,b,c,d,f,g,h,k,n,o,p} ∩ {a,b,e,f,g,h,i,j,k,l,m,n,o,p}) ∩ ({c,e,f,j,k,l,m,n} ∩ {c,d})
(define P2
  (inter
    (inter '(a b c d f g h k n o p) '(a b e f g h i j k l m n o p))
    (inter '(c e f j k l m n) '(c d))))

;; P3 = ((({b,c,d,h,j,k,n} ∪ {a,b,d,h,i,j,k,l,m,n,o}) ∪ {b,g,k,l}) ∩ {a,b,d,e,g,h,i,j,k,l,n,o}) ∪ ({b,c,d,g,i,k,l,m,n,o} ∪ {g,h,l})
(define P3
  (un
    (inter
      (un (un '(b c d h j k n) '(a b d h i j k l m n o)) '(b g k l))
      '(a b d e g h i j k l n o))
    (un '(b c d g i k l m n o) '(g h l))))

;; P4 = {a,b,e,f,h,i,n,o,p} ∩ (({c,f,i,j,k} ∩ {m}) ∩ {d,h,j,n})
(define P4
  (inter '(a b e f h i n o p)
         (inter (inter '(c f i j k) '(m)) '(d h j n))))

;; B1 = (((P1 ∩ P2) ∩ P3) ∪ P4) ∩ {c,e,f,g,h,i,j,k,l,n,p}
(define B1
  (inter
    (un (inter (inter P1 P2) P3) P4)
    '(c e f g h i j k l n p)))

(list 'P1 (sort-set P1) 'P2 (sort-set P2) 'P3 (sort-set P3) 'P4 (sort-set P4) 'B1 (sort-set B1))

(define (dedup lst)
  (cond ((null? lst) '())
        ((member (car lst) (cdr lst)) (dedup (cdr lst)))
        (else (cons (car lst) (dedup (cdr lst))))))

(define (U a b) (dedup (append a b)))
(define (I a b) (filter (lambda (x) (member x b)) a))
(define (S . xs) xs)

(define (sort-set s)
  (sort s (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b)))))

;; Test
(sort-set (U '(a b c) '(b c d e)))

(sort LESS? LST) → list
  Form: procedure
  Return a list containing the elements of LST sorted according
  to the comparison procedure LESS?. The input list is not modified.
  Uses a stable merge sort: equal elements preserve their original
  order.
  Parameters:
    LESS? : procedure -- a two-argument comparison predicate
    LST : list
  Returns: list
  Category: lists
  Keywords: sort, order, merge sort, stable, list

(import (srfi 1))
(define (U . sets) (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-union eq? acc s)) '() sets))
(define (I . sets) (if (null? sets) '() (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-intersection eq? acc s)) (car sets) (cdr sets))))
(define (sort-syms s)
  (list-sort (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b))) s))

(define result
  (U
    (U
      (U
        (I
          (I '(e f h i j k n o p) '(b f g h i k o))
          (U (I '(c f n p) (I '(c g i j k m n) '(a b c e f g h j k l m n o p)))
             '(b c d e f h i j k l m n p)))
        (I '(b i o) '(a b d e g h i l m p)))
      (U
        (I (U '(a c d i j k l m n p) '(a f h l m))
           (U (I '(d p) (I (I '(a b c d e f h i j k l m n o p) '(a b c d e f g h i j k l n o p))
                           (U '(l) '(a d e g i j k l m n o p))))
              (U '(a b c d e f g l n p) '(a c d e g h j k m n o p))))
        (U '(a b d e f g h i j k l m n p)
           (U '(a c h i j k l m n o)
              (U '(a b c d e f h i j k l m n o p)
                 (I
                   (U (U '(d e g k o) (U '(a b c d f g i j l m p) (U '(e f g i l m n) '(e f g n p))))
                      '(b c d e f k l m p))
                   (U (U '(b e p) (I '(a c e f g i j n o) (U '(b c d e f j k o p) '(e))))
                      '(a i j))))))))
    (U
      (I '(b h i m p) '(c d f i j l m))
      (U
        (I
          (U (U '(d e f g h i k m n) '(c d f h i j m n))
             (U (U '(f k) '(a b c d e f g i j k l m n p))
                (U (U (I '(a b c f h k o) '(a e f i o p)) '(h l p))
                   (I '(b e f) (I '(a e i m n) (U '(a c e f) '(h)))))))
          (I
            (I (U '(i n o p) '(a c d e f g h i j k l m n o p))
               (U '(e f i n o) '(f i)))
            (U (U (U '(c d e j k l m n o p) '(b e f o)) '(b c e n))
               (U '(a b c d e f g h j o p) (I '(l n o p) '(g))))))))))

(define (union . sets)
  (let loop ((ss sets) (acc '()))
    (if (null? ss) (sort acc (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b))))
        (loop (cdr ss)
              (let merge ((xs (car ss)) (a acc))
                (if (null? xs) a
                    (if (memq (car xs) a) (merge (cdr xs) a)
                        (merge (cdr xs) (cons (car xs) a)))))))))

(define (inter . sets)
  (if (null? sets) '()
      (let loop ((ss (cdr sets)) (acc (car sets)))
        (if (null? ss) (sort acc (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b))))
            (loop (cdr ss)
                  (filter (lambda (x) (memq x (car ss))) acc))))))

(sort LESS? LST) → list
  Form: procedure
  Return a list containing the elements of LST sorted according
  to the comparison procedure LESS?. The input list is not modified.
  Uses a stable merge sort: equal elements preserve their original
  order.
  Parameters:
    LESS? : procedure -- a two-argument comparison predicate
    LST : list
  Returns: list
  Category: lists
  Keywords: sort, order, merge sort, stable, list

arguments.code:
(define (my-filter p xs)
  (if (null? xs) '()
      (if (p (car xs)) (cons (car xs) (my-filter p (cdr xs)))
          (my-filter p (cdr xs)))))

(define (sort-syms xs)
  (sort (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b))) xs))

(define (union . sets)
  (let loop ((ss sets) (acc '()))
    (if (null? ss) (sort-syms acc)
        (loop (cdr ss)
              (let merge ((xs (car ss)) (a acc))
                (if (null? xs) a
                    (if (memq (car xs) a) (merge (cdr xs) a)
                        (merge (cdr xs) (cons (car xs) a)))))))))

(define (inter . sets)
  (if (null? sets) '()
      (let loop ((ss (cdr sets)) (acc (car sets)))
        (if (null? ss) (sort-syms acc)
            (loop (cdr ss)
                  (my-filter (lambda (x) (memq x (car ss))) acc))))))

arguments.code:
(define (bit c) (arithmetic-shift 1 (- (char->integer c) (char->integer #\a))))
(define (S . cs) (apply bitwise-or (map bit cs)))
(define (U a b) (bitwise-or a b))
(define (I a b) (bitwise-and a b))
(define (show n)
  (let loop ((i 0) (acc '()))
    (if (= i 16)
        (list->string (reverse acc))
        (loop (+ i 1)
              (if (not (zero? (bitwise-and n (arithmetic-shift 1 i))))
                  (cons (integer->char (+ i (char->integer #\a))) acc)
                  acc)))))
(show (S #\a #\c #\e))

arguments.code:
(define (U a b)
  (cond ((null? a) b)
        ((null? b) a)
        ((char<? (car a) (car b)) (cons (car a) (U (cdr a) b)))
        ((char<? (car b) (car a)) (cons (car b) (U a (cdr b))))
        (else (cons (car a) (U (cdr a) (cdr b))))))
(define (I a b)
  (cond ((null? a) '())
        ((null? b) '())
        ((char<? (car a) (car b)) (I (cdr a) b))
        ((char<? (car b) (car a)) (I a (cdr b)))
        (else (cons (car a) (I (cdr a) (cdr b))))))
(define (S . cs) cs)  ; already in alpha order as entered
(U (S #\a #\c) (S #\b #\c #\d))

  Form: procedure

(define (set-union a b)
  (cond ((null? a) b)
        ((null? b) a)
        ((eq? (car a) (car b)) (cons (car a) (set-union (cdr a) (cdr b))))
        ((string<? (symbol->string (car a)) (symbol->string (car b)))
         (cons (car a) (set-union (cdr a) b)))
        (else (cons (car b) (set-union a (cdr b))))))
(define (set-inter a b)
  (cond ((null? a) '())
        ((null? b) '())
        ((eq? (car a) (car b)) (cons (car a) (set-inter (cdr a) (cdr b))))
        ((string<? (symbol->string (car a)) (symbol->string (car b)))
         (set-inter (cdr a) b))
        (else (set-inter a (cdr b)))))
(define (S . xs) xs)

arguments.code:
(define (U a b) 
  (let loop ((r a) (b b))
    (if (null? b) r
        (loop (if (memq (car b) r) r (cons (car b) r)) (cdr b)))))
(define (I a b)
  (let loop ((a a) (r '()))
    (cond ((null? a) (reverse r))
          ((memq (car a) b) (loop (cdr a) (cons (car a) r)))
          (else (loop (cdr a) r)))))
(define (sortsym s)
  (sort (lambda (x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y))) s))
(sortsym (U '(a b) '(c b)))

tool_trace.output: {"value":"(a b c)"}

;; Build a parser. Tokens: '(', ')', '{...}', '∪', '∩'
;; ∪ is multi-byte UTF-8. Let me use string indexing carefully.
(define (char-at s i) (string-ref s i))

;; Tokenize: produce a list of tokens as strings or lists (for sets)
;; Sets become sorted lists of chars.

(define (parse-set-literal s i)
  ;; s[i] = '{', read until '}', collect letters
  (let loop ((j (+ i 1)) (acc '()))
    (let ((c (string-ref s j)))
      (cond
        ((char=? c #\}) (values (sort char<? acc) (+ j 1)))
        ((and (char>=? c #\a) (char<=? c #\z)) (loop (+ j 1) (cons c acc)))
        (else (loop (+ j 1) acc))))))

;; Test
(parse-set-literal "{a, b, c}" 0)

;; parse-expr returns (values set new-index)
;; expr := atom (op atom)*  where atom is '(' expr ')' or '{...}'
;; op is ∪ or ∩. Left-associative.

(define (skip-ws s i)
  (let loop ((i i))
    (if (>= i (string-length s)) i
        (let ((c (string-ref s i)))
          (if (or (char=? c #\space) (char=? c #\tab) (char=? c #\newline))
              (loop (+ i 1))
              i)))))

;; detect operator at position i. Returns 'union, 'intersect, or #f, plus new index
(define (parse-op s i)
  (let ((i (skip-ws s i)))
    (if (>= i (string-length s)) (values #f i)
        ;; UTF-8: ∪ = E2 88 AA, ∩ = E2 88 A9
        (let ((b0 (char->integer (string-ref s i))))
          (cond
            ((= b0 #xE2)
             (let ((b2 (char->integer (string-ref s (+ i 2)))))
               (cond
                 ((= b2 #xAA) (values 'union (+ i 3)))
                 ((= b2 #xA9) (values 'intersect (+ i 3)))
                 (else (values #f i)))))
            (else (values #f i)))))))

(define (parse-atom s i)
  (let ((i (skip-ws s i)))
    (let ((c (string-ref s i)))
      (cond
        ((char=? c #\{) (parse-set-literal s i))
        ((char=? c #\()
         (call-with-values (lambda () (parse-expr s (+ i 1)))
           (lambda (v j)
             (let ((j (skip-ws s j)))
               (if (char=? (string-ref s j) #\))
                   (values v (+ j 1))
                   (error "expected )"))))))
        (else (error "unexpected char" c i))))))

(define (parse-expr s i)
  (call-with-values (lambda () (parse-atom s i))
    (lambda (left j)
      (let loop ((left left) (j j))
        (call-with-values (lambda () (parse-op s j))
          (lambda (op k)
            (cond
              ((not op) (values left j))
              (else
               (call-with-values (lambda () (parse-atom s k))
                 (lambda (right m)
                   (let ((combined (if (eq? op 'union) (U left right) (I left right))))
                     (loop combined m))))))))))))

(call-with-values (lambda () (parse-expr expr 0))
  (lambda (v j) (list v j (string-length expr))))

  (let ((i (skip-ws s i)))
    (if (>= i (string-length s)) (values #f i)
        (let ((c (string-ref s i)))
          (cond
            ((char=? c UNION-CHAR) (values 'union (+ i 1)))
            ((char=? c INTER-CHAR) (values 'intersect (+ i 1)))
            (else (values #f i)))))))

(call-with-values (lambda () (parse-expr expr 0))
  (lambda (v j) (list (list->string v) j (string-length expr))))

(define (set-union a b)
  (let loop ((xs b) (acc a))
    (cond ((null? xs) (sort symbol<? acc))
          ((member (car xs) acc) (loop (cdr xs) acc))
          (else (loop (cdr xs) (cons (car xs) acc))))))
(define (set-inter a b)
  (sort symbol<? (filter (lambda (x) (member x b)) a)))
(define (symbol<? a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b)))
(set-union '(a b c) '(b c d))

  Form: procedure
  Return a list containing the elements of LST sorted according

  Category: lists
  Keywords: sort, order, merge sort, stable, list

(import (srfi 1))
(define (U . sets) (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-union eq? acc s)) '() sets))
(define (I . sets) (if (null? sets) '() (fold (lambda (s acc) (lset-intersection eq? acc s)) (car sets) (cdr sets))))
(define (sort-set s)
  (list-sort (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b))) s))
(sort-set (I '(a b c) '(b c d)))

(define (count-char s c)
  (let loop ((i 0) (n 0))
    (if (= i (string-length s)) n
        (loop (+ i 1) (if (char=? (string-ref s i) c) (+ n 1) n)))))

;; Let me write a simple recursive-descent parser over a token stream.
;; Tokens: '(', ')', '{...}' (set literal), '∪', '∩'.
;; Grammar: expr = atom (op atom)*  or just atom.
;; atom = '{' elems '}' | '(' expr ')'
;; Since the original is fully parenthesized, inside each '(' ')' we have: atom op atom
;; (where each atom is either a set literal or a parenthesized expr).

;; First, tokenize.
(define (tokenize s)
  (let loop ((i 0) (acc '()))
    (cond
      ((= i (string-length s)) (reverse acc))
      (else
       (let ((c (string-ref s i)))
         (cond
           ((char-whitespace? c) (loop (+ i 1) acc))
           ((char=? c #\() (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'lp acc)))
           ((char=? c #\)) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'rp acc)))
           ((char=? c #\,) (loop (+ i 1) acc))
           ((char=? c #\{)
            ;; read until }
            (let scan ((j (+ i 1)) (elems '()) (cur '()))
              (let ((d (string-ref s j)))
                (cond
                  ((char=? d #\})
                   (let* ((final (if (null? cur) elems (cons (string->symbol (list->string (reverse cur))) elems)))
                          (set-list (reverse final)))
                     (loop (+ j 1) (cons (cons 'set set-list) acc))))
                  ((or (char=? d #\,) (char-whitespace? d))
                   (if (null? cur)
                       (scan (+ j 1) elems cur)
                       (scan (+ j 1) (cons (string->symbol (list->string (reverse cur))) elems) '())))
                  (else (scan (+ j 1) elems (cons d cur)))))))
           ;; Handle ∪ and ∩ - they are multi-byte UTF-8
           (else
            ;; Check bytes - assume ∪ is e2 88 aa, ∩ is e2 88 a9
            (let ((b0 (char->integer c)))
              (cond
                ((= b0 #xe2)
                 (let ((b1 (char->integer (string-ref s (+ i 1))))
                       (b2 (char->integer (string-ref s (+ i 2)))))
                   (cond
                     ((and (= b1 #x88) (= b2 #xaa)) (loop (+ i 3) (cons 'union acc)))
                     ((and (= b1 #x88) (= b2 #xa9)) (loop (+ i 3) (cons 'inter acc)))
                     (else (error "unknown" b0 b1 b2)))))
                (else (error "unknown char" c b0))))))))))))

(define toks (tokenize B-text))
(length toks)

;; Now parse. Grammar: each parenthesized group is (atom op atom). Atom is (set ...) or lp...rp.
;; Evaluate directly.
(define (parse toks)
  ;; returns (value . rest-tokens)
  (cond
    ((null? toks) (error "empty"))
    ((eq? (car toks) 'lp)
     ;; parse expr inside, then expect rp
     (let* ((p1 (parse-atom (cdr toks)))
            (left (car p1))
            (r1 (cdr p1)))
       (cond
         ((and (not (null? r1)) (eq? (car r1) 'rp))
          ;; single atom wrapped in parens
          (cons left (cdr r1)))
         ((and (not (null? r1)) (or (eq? (car r1) 'union) (eq? (car r1) 'inter)))
          (let* ((op (car r1))
                 (p2 (parse-atom (cdr r1)))
                 (right (car p2))
                 (r2 (cdr p2)))
            (if (and (not (null? r2)) (eq? (car r2) 'rp))
                (cons (if (eq? op 'union) (U left right) (I left right)) (cdr r2))
                (error "expected rp"))))
         (else (error "expected op or rp" r1)))))
    (else (error "expected lp" toks))))

(define (parse-atom toks)
  (cond
    ((null? toks) (error "empty atom"))
    ((and (pair? (car toks)) (eq? (caar toks) 'set))
     (cons (cdar toks) (cdr toks)))
    ((eq? (car toks) 'lp) (parse toks))
    (else (error "expected atom" toks))))

(define result-B (car (parse-atom toks)))
(ss result-B)

;; Parser: transform the expression string to Scheme, then eval.
;; Replace {a,b,c} with (mk "abc"), ∩ with I, ∪ with U.

(define (tokens->scheme s)
  ;; Replace set literals {x, y, z} with (mk "xyz")
  ;; First, process char by char
  (let loop ((chars (string->list s)) (out '()) (in-set #f) (cur '()))
    (cond
      ((null? chars)
       (list->string (reverse out)))
      ((char=? (car chars) #\{)
       (loop (cdr chars) out #t '()))
      ((char=? (car chars) #\})
       ;; emit (mk "...")
       (let* ((letters (filter char-alphabetic? cur))
              (str (list->string (reverse letters)))
              (emit (string->list (string-append "(mk \"" str "\")"))))
         (loop (cdr chars) (append (reverse emit) out) #f '())))
      (in-set
       (loop (cdr chars) out #t (cons (car chars) cur)))
      (else
       (loop (cdr chars) (cons (car chars) out) #f cur)))))

;; Now replace ∩ (3 bytes in UTF-8: 0xE2 0x88 0xA9) with I
;; and ∪ (0xE2 0x88 0xAA) with U
;; Simpler: do string-replace using string operations
(define (str-replace str old new)
  ;; naive
  (let loop ((i 0) (out '()))
    (cond
      ((> (+ i (string-length old)) (string-length str))
       (list->string (append (reverse out) (string->list (substring str i (string-length str))))))
      ((string=? (substring str i (+ i (string-length old))) old)
       (loop (+ i (string-length old)) (append (reverse (string->list new)) out)))
      (else
       (loop (+ i 1) (cons (string-ref str i) out))))))

(define step2 (str-replace step1 "∪" " U "))
;; Set literals still have {}. Process them.
(define step3 (tokens->scheme step2))

;; Now I need to convert infix to prefix. Since ∩ and ∪ are written infix with no precedence
;; (fully parenthesized), I can convert (X op Y) to (op X Y) simply.
;; The structure is: ( X op Y ) where X and Y are either set literals (now (mk "...")) or parenthesized.
;;
;; Approach: tokenize, then transform. Any binary expression is (E1 OP E2).
;; I'll evaluate by writing a simple recursive-descent-ish parser.

;; Actually simpler: I'll do text substitution. Every matched (EXPR OP EXPR) becomes (OP EXPR EXPR).
;; But EXPRs can be nested. Let me parse tokens properly.

(define (tokenize s)
  (let loop ((i 0) (toks '()))
    (cond
      ((>= i (string-length s)) (reverse toks))
      ((char-whitespace? (string-ref s i)) (loop (+ i 1) toks))
      ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\() (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'LP toks)))
      ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\)) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'RP toks)))
      ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\I) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'I toks)))
      ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\U) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'U toks)))
      ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\m)
       ;; parse (mk "...") - but this starts after LP already consumed? Let me re-examine
       ;; The token is 'mk' followed by "..."
       (let* ((end-quote (let find ((j (+ i 4))) ; skip 'mk "'
                          (if (char=? (string-ref s j) #\")
                              j
                              (find (+ j 1)))))
              (str (substring s (+ i 4) end-quote)))
         (loop (+ end-quote 1) (cons (list 'SET str) toks))))
      (else (error "unexpected" i (string-ref s i))))))

;; Hmm, (mk "...") has LP before mk. So when we see LP then 'm' then 'k' then space then " then ... then " then RP
;; Let me treat (mk "...") as a unit in tokenizer.

(define (tokenize2 s)
  (let loop ((i 0) (toks '()))
    (cond
      ((>= i (string-length s)) (reverse toks))
      ((char-whitespace? (string-ref s i)) (loop (+ i 1) toks))
      ((and (char=? (string-ref s i) #\()
            (< (+ i 4) (string-length s))
            (char=? (string-ref s (+ i 1)) #\m)
            (char=? (string-ref s (+ i 2)) #\k))
       ;; (mk "..."). Find closing quote then RP
       (let* ((q1 (let find ((j (+ i 3)))
                    (if (char=? (string-ref s j) #\") j (find (+ j 1)))))
              (q2 (let find ((j (+ q1 1)))
                    (if (char=? (string-ref s j) #\") j (find (+ j 1)))))
              (rp (let find ((j (+ q2 1)))
                    (if (char=? (string-ref s j) #\)) j (find (+ j 1)))))
              (str (substring s (+ q1 1) q2)))
         (loop (+ rp 1) (cons (list 'SET str) toks))))
      ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\() (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'LP toks)))
      ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\)) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'RP toks)))
      ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\I) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'I toks)))
      ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\U) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'U toks)))
      (else (error "unexpected" i (string-ref s i))))))

(define toks (tokenize2 step3))
(length toks)

;; Now parse: expression is either SET or (EXPR OP EXPR)
(define (parse toks)
  (cond
    ((and (pair? toks) (pair? (car toks)) (eq? (caar toks) 'SET))
     (values (cadar toks) (cdr toks)))
    ((and (pair? toks) (eq? (car toks) 'LP))
     (call-with-values (lambda () (parse (cdr toks)))
       (lambda (e1 rest)
         (let ((op (car rest)))
           (call-with-values (lambda () (parse (cdr rest)))
             (lambda (e2 rest2)
               (if (not (eq? (car rest2) 'RP))
                   (error "expected RP")
                   (values (list op e1 e2) (cdr rest2)))))))))
    (else (error "parse failed" (if (pair? toks) (car toks) '())))))

(define (evalset tree)
  (if (string? tree)
      (sort char<? (delete-duplicates (string->list tree)))
      (let ((op (car tree)) (a (evalset (cadr tree))) (b (evalset (caddr tree))))
        (case op
          ((I) (filter (lambda (x) (member x b)) a))
          ((U) (sort char<? (delete-duplicates (append a b))))))))

(call-with-values (lambda () (parse toks))
  (lambda (tree rest)
    (list (list->string (evalset tree)) (length rest))))

(define (to-set lst) (sort (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b))) (delete-duplicates lst)))
(define (union . sets) (to-set (apply append sets)))
(define (intersect a b) (filter (lambda (x) (member x b)) a))
(define (delete-duplicates lst)
  (cond ((null? lst) '())
        ((member (car lst) (cdr lst)) (delete-duplicates (cdr lst)))
        (else (cons (car lst) (delete-duplicates (cdr lst))))))
(to-set '(c a b))

(sort LESS? LST) → list
  Form: procedure
  Return a list containing the elements of LST sorted according
  to the comparison procedure LESS?. The input list is not modified.
  Uses a stable merge sort: equal elements preserve their original
  order.
  Parameters:
    LESS? : procedure -- a two-argument comparison predicate
    LST : list
  Returns: list
  Category: lists
  Keywords: sort, order, merge sort, stable, list

(import (srfi 1))
(define (to-set lst) (sort (lambda (a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b))) (delete-duplicates lst)))
(define (U . sets) (to-set (apply append sets)))
(define (I a b) (filter (lambda (x) (member x b)) (to-set a)))
(to-set '(c a b a))

(define (dedup lst)
  (let loop ((l lst) (acc '()))
    (cond ((null? l) (reverse acc))
          ((memq (car l) acc) (loop (cdr l) acc))
          (else (loop (cdr l) (cons (car l) acc))))))
(define (U a b) (dedup (append a b)))
(define (I a b) (filter (lambda (x) (memq x b)) a))
(define (sym<? x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y)))
(define (show s) (sort sym<? (dedup s)))

                      (I '(b d e h i j k o p) '(a b c d e f g h i j k l m o p))))
                (U '(d e g i l o p) (U '(a b c e h i) '(d)))))))
      (U '(b c d e f g i j l m o p) '(b e n)))
     (U (I (U '(a b c d e h i j k l m n p) '(b)) '(a b c f g h i j k l m o p))

(define (myfilter p l) (if (null? l) '() (if (p (car l)) (cons (car l) (myfilter p (cdr l))) (myfilter p (cdr l)))))
(define (dedup lst)
  (let loop ((l lst) (acc '()))
    (cond ((null? l) (reverse acc))
          ((memq (car l) acc) (loop (cdr l) acc))
          (else (loop (cdr l) (cons (car l) acc))))))
(define (U a b) (dedup (append a b)))
(define (I a b) (myfilter (lambda (x) (memq x b)) a))
(define (sym<? x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y)))
(define (show s) (sort sym<? (dedup s)))
(show (U '(a c b) '(b d)))

(sort LESS? LST) → list
  Form: procedure
  Return a list containing the elements of LST sorted according
  to the comparison procedure LESS?. The input list is not modified.
  Uses a stable merge sort: equal elements preserve their original
  order.
  Parameters:
    LESS? : procedure -- a two-argument comparison predicate
    LST : list
  Returns: list
  Category: lists
  Keywords: sort, order, merge sort, stable, list

(sort LESS? LST) → list
  Form: procedure
  Return a list containing the elements of LST sorted according
  to the comparison procedure LESS?. The input list is not modified.
  Uses a stable merge sort: equal elements preserve their original
  order.
  Parameters:
    LESS? : procedure -- a two-argument comparison predicate
    LST : list
  Returns: list
  Category: lists
  Keywords: sort, order, merge sort, stable, list

;; But we don't know which operator until we see it. Let me write a parser.

;; Parse: expr = number | "(" expr OP expr ")"
(define (tokenize s)
  ;; returns list of tokens: '(, '), 'm, 'p, or numbers
  (let loop ((i 0) (toks '()))
    (cond ((>= i (string-length s)) (reverse toks))
          ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\() (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'lp toks)))
          ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\)) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'rp toks)))
          ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\space) (loop (+ i 1) toks))
          ((char-numeric? (string-ref s i))
           (let inner ((j i))
             (if (and (< j (string-length s)) (char-numeric? (string-ref s j)))
                 (inner (+ j 1))
                 (loop j (cons (string->number (substring s i j)) toks)))))
          ;; non-ASCII chars: ⊕ is 3 bytes in UTF-8: E2 8A 95, ⊗ is E2 8A 97
          (else
           (let ((b (char->integer (string-ref s i))))
             (if (= b #xe2)
                 ;; check third byte
                 (let ((b3 (char->integer (string-ref s (+ i 2)))))
                   (if (= b3 #x95)
                       (loop (+ i 3) (cons 'plus toks))
                       (loop (+ i 3) (cons 'times toks))))
                 (loop (+ i 1) toks)))))))

(define toks (tokenize expr-str))
(length toks)

;; Now parse tokens into a Scheme expression
(define (parse toks)
  ;; returns (expr . rest-toks)
  (let ((t (car toks)))
    (cond ((number? t) (cons t (cdr toks)))
          ((eq? t 'lp)
           (let* ((r1 (parse (cdr toks)))
                  (e1 (car r1))
                  (rest1 (cdr r1))
                  (op (car rest1))
                  (r2 (parse (cdr rest1)))
                  (e2 (car r2))
                  (rest2 (cdr r2)))
             ;; rest2 should start with rp
             (cons (list (if (eq? op 'plus) 'min '+) e1 e2) (cdr rest2))))
          (else (error "unexpected token" t)))))

(define parsed (car (parse toks)))
(eval parsed)

;; Tokenize: split into list of tokens: "(", ")", "+", "x", or number
;; ⊕ is UTF-8 bytes: E2 8A 95; ⊗ is E2 8A 97. I'll detect by char.
(define (tokenize str)
  (let loop ((i 0) (tokens '()))
    (cond
      ((>= i (string-length str)) (reverse tokens))
      (else
        (let ((c (string-ref str i)))
          (cond
            ((char=? c #\space) (loop (+ i 1) tokens))
            ((char=? c #\() (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'lp tokens)))
            ((char=? c #\)) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'rp tokens)))
            ((char=? c #\⊕) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'oplus tokens)))
            ((char=? c #\⊗) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'otimes tokens)))
            ((char-numeric? c)
             ;; read number
             (let inner ((j i) (digits '()))
               (if (and (< j (string-length str)) (char-numeric? (string-ref str j)))
                   (inner (+ j 1) (cons (string-ref str j) digits))
                   (loop j (cons (string->number (list->string (reverse digits))) tokens)))))
            (else (error "unexpected char" c))))))))
(define toks (tokenize expr))
(length toks)

;; Parse grammar: E := num | ( E op E ); returns (value, rest-tokens)
(define (parse toks)
  (let ((t (car toks)))
    (cond
      ((number? t) (values t (cdr toks)))
      ((eq? t 'lp)
       (call-with-values (lambda () (parse (cdr toks)))
         (lambda (a rest1)
           (let ((op (car rest1)))
             (call-with-values (lambda () (parse (cdr rest1)))
               (lambda (b rest2)
                 ;; expect 'rp
                 (unless (eq? (car rest2) 'rp) (error "expected rp"))
                 (let ((v (cond ((eq? op 'oplus) (min a b))
                                ((eq? op 'otimes) (+ a b))
                                (else (error "bad op" op)))))
                   (values v (cdr rest2))))))))))))
(call-with-values (lambda () (parse toks))
  (lambda (v rest)
    (list 'result v 'remaining rest)))

        (let ((c (string-ref str i)))

;; Actually let me write a parser
(define (parse str)
  (let ((pos 0) (n (string-length str)))
    (define (peek) (if (< pos n) (string-ref str pos) #f))
    (define (advance) (set! pos (+ pos 1)))
    (define (skip-ws) (let loop () (when (and (< pos n) (char=? (peek) #\space)) (advance) (loop))))
    (define (parse-expr)
      (skip-ws)
      (cond
        ((char=? (peek) #\()
         (advance)
         (let ((left (parse-expr)))
           (skip-ws)
           (let ((op (peek)))
             (advance)
             (let ((right (parse-expr)))
               (skip-ws)
               (if (char=? (peek) #\)) (advance))
               (if (char=? op #\M) (min left right) (+ left right))))))
        (else
         (let loop ((acc 0))
           (if (and (< pos n) (char-numeric? (peek)))
               (let ((d (- (char->integer (peek)) (char->integer #\0))))
                 (advance)
                 (loop (+ (* acc 10) d)))
               acc)))))
    (parse-expr)))
;; test
(parse "((3 M 5) P (2 M 7))")

arguments.code:
;; Parse the expression. Skip whitespace, read either number or (expr OP expr)
(define input (string->list expr))
(define pos 0)
(define chars (list->vector input))
(define n (vector-length chars))

(define (peek) (if (< pos n) (vector-ref chars pos) #f))
(define (advance) (set! pos (+ pos 1)))
(define (skip-ws) (let loop () (when (and (peek) (char=? (peek) #\space)) (advance) (loop))))

(define (parse-expr)
  (skip-ws)
  (cond
    ((char=? (peek) #\()
     (advance)
     (let ((a (parse-expr)))
       (skip-ws)
       (let ((op (peek)))
         (advance)
         (let ((b (parse-expr)))
           (skip-ws)
           ;; expect )
           (advance)  ; consume )
           (if (char=? op #\⊕) (min a b) (+ a b))))))
    (else
     ;; parse number
     (let loop ((digits '()))
       (let ((c (peek)))
         (if (and c (char-numeric? c))
             (begin (advance) (loop (cons c digits)))
             (string->number (list->string (reverse digits)))))))))

(parse-expr)

;; Test: ((64 ⊕ 4) ⊕ (50 ⊕ 7)) should be min(min(64,4), min(50,7)) = min(4,7) = 4
(define test "((64 ⊕ 4) ⊕ (50 ⊕ 7))")
(set! chars (list->vector (string->list test)))
(set! n (vector-length chars))
(set! pos 0)
(parse-expr)

(define pos 0)
(define tv (list->vector toks))
(define (peek) (vector-ref tv pos))
(define (advance) (let ((v (vector-ref tv pos))) (set! pos (+ pos 1)) v))

(define (parse-expr)

    (cond ((number? t) (advance))
          ((eq? t 'lp)
           (advance) ;; (

             (let ((op (advance)))
               (let ((b (parse-expr)))
                 (advance) ;; )
                 (if (eq? op 'min-op) (min a b) (+ a b)))))))))

  (let-values (((e rest) (p toks)))

;; Tokenize then parse as binary tree
(define (tokenize s)
  (let loop ((chars (string->list s)) (acc '()) (cur '()))
    (define (flush cur acc)
      (if (null? cur) acc
          (cons (string->number (list->string (reverse cur))) acc)))
    (cond
      ((null? chars) (reverse (flush cur acc)))
      ((char=? (car chars) #\() (loop (cdr chars) (cons 'LP (flush cur acc)) '()))
      ((char=? (car chars) #\)) (loop (cdr chars) (cons 'RP (flush cur acc)) '()))
      ((char=? (car chars) #\space) (loop (cdr chars) (flush cur acc) '()))
      ((char-numeric? (car chars)) (loop (cdr chars) acc (cons (car chars) cur)))
      (else
       ;; Unicode char (⊕ or ⊗). They are multi-byte. We need to handle by looking at char directly.
       ;; In wile, (char=? c #\⊕) may work.
       (let ((c (car chars)))
         (cond
           ((char=? c #\⊕) (loop (cdr chars) (cons 'OPLUS (flush cur acc)) '()))
           ((char=? c #\⊗) (loop (cdr chars) (cons 'OTIMES (flush cur acc)) '()))
           (else (loop (cdr chars) (flush cur acc) '()))))))))

(define toks (tokenize expr-str))
(length toks)

;; Parse: each group is "( expr OP expr )" or a number
(define (parse toks)
  ;; returns (value . rest-tokens)
  (cond
    ((number? (car toks)) (cons (car toks) (cdr toks)))
    ((eq? (car toks) 'LP)
     (let* ((r1 (parse (cdr toks)))
            (left (car r1))
            (after-left (cdr r1))
            (op (car after-left))
            (r2 (parse (cdr after-left)))
            (right (car r2))

;; Parse infix expression with single-char ops # (min) and @ (+), parens, and integers.
;; All operations left-to-right but expression is fully parenthesized.
(define (tokenize s)
  (let loop ((i 0) (tokens '()))
    (cond ((>= i (string-length s)) (reverse tokens))
          ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\space) (loop (+ i 1) tokens))
          ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\() (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'lp tokens)))
          ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\)) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'rp tokens)))
          ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\#) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'min tokens)))
          ((char=? (string-ref s i) #\@) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'plus tokens)))
          (else
           ;; read number
           (let inner ((j i))
             (if (and (< j (string-length s))
                      (let ((c (string-ref s j)))
                        (and (char>=? c #\0) (char<=? c #\9))))
                 (inner (+ j 1))
                 (loop j (cons (string->number (substring s i j)) tokens))))))))

(define toks (tokenize expr-str))
(length toks)

;; Parse fully parenthesized expression: either number, or (expr OP expr)
(define (parse tokens)
  ;; returns (value . remaining)
  (let ((t (car tokens)) (rest (cdr tokens)))
    (cond
     ((number? t) (cons t rest))
     ((eq? t 'lp)
      (let* ((p1 (parse rest))
             (left (car p1))
             (after1 (cdr p1))
             (op (car after1))
             (p2 (parse (cdr after1)))
             (right (car p2))
             (after2 (cdr p2)))
        ;; after2 should start with 'rp
        (cons (if (eq? op 'min) (min left right) (+ left right))
              (cdr after2))))
     (else (error "unexpected" t)))))

(define result (parse toks))
(car result)

arguments.code:
;; Parse infix expression with operators ⊕ and ⊗, where every binary op is fully parenthesized.
;; Grammar: E -> number | ( E OP E )
(define (parse s)
  (define i 0)
  (define n (string-length s))
  (define (peek) (string-ref s i))
  (define (advance) (set! i (+ i 1)))
  (define (skip-ws) (let loop () (when (and (< i n) (char=? (peek) #\space)) (advance) (loop))))
  (define (parse-num)
    (let loop ((acc '()))
      (if (and (< i n) (char-numeric? (peek)))
          (let ((c (peek))) (advance) (loop (cons c acc)))
          (string->number (list->string (reverse acc))))))
  (define (parse-op)
    ;; ⊕ or ⊗ - these are multibyte UTF-8; read until space
    (let loop ((acc '()))
      (if (and (< i n) (not (char=? (peek) #\space)))
          (let ((c (peek))) (advance) (loop (cons c acc)))
          (list->string (reverse acc)))))
  (define (parse-expr)
    (skip-ws)
    (cond
      ((char=? (peek) #\()
       (advance) ;; consume (
       (skip-ws)
       (let ((a (parse-expr)))
         (skip-ws)
         (let ((op (parse-op)))
           (skip-ws)
           (let ((b (parse-expr)))
             (skip-ws)
             ;; consume )
             (advance)
             (if (string=? op "⊕")
                 (min a b)
                 (+ a b))))))
      (else (parse-num))))
  (parse-expr))

(parse expr)

arguments.code:
;; Write a simple char-by-char replacement. ⊕ and ⊗ are multi-byte UTF-8.
;; Let's check encoding
(define s "⊕")
(string-length s)

;; Good - unicode char. Do replacement by converting to list, substituting strings
(define (replace-chars str)
  (let loop ((chars (string->list str)) (acc '()))
    (if (null? chars)
        (list->string (reverse acc))
        (let ((c (car chars)))
          (cond
            ((char=? c #\⊕) (loop (cdr chars) (append (reverse (string->list "o+ ")) (cons #\space acc))))
            ((char=? c #\⊗) (loop (cdr chars) (append (reverse (string->list "o* ")) (cons #\space acc))))
            (else (loop (cdr chars) (cons c acc))))))))

;; But actually these operators are INFIX in the original; we need to convert (a ⊕ b) to (o+ a b).
;; If we replace ⊕ with "o+ " and ⊗ with "o* ", then (a o+ b) isn't valid Scheme.
;; We need to move the operator to prefix position. But every binary op is surrounded by parens as (A op B).
;; So transform: for each "(A op B)" substring, pattern is literal text.
;; Simpler: walk through and when we see "(X ⊕ Y)" at the character level, we need to handle nesting.

;; Let me write a reader that parses: <expr> ::= number | (<expr> OP <expr>)
(define (tokenize str)
  (let loop ((chars (string->list str)) (acc '()) (cur '()))
    (define (flush) (if (null? cur) '() (list (string->number (list->string (reverse cur))))))
    (if (null? chars)
        (reverse (append (flush) acc))
        (let ((c (car chars)))
          (cond
            ((char=? c #\() (loop (cdr chars) (cons 'lp (append (flush) acc)) '()))
            ((char=? c #\)) (loop (cdr chars) (cons 'rp (append (flush) acc)) '()))
            ((char=? c #\space) (loop (cdr chars) (append (flush) acc) '()))
            ((char=? c #\⊕) (loop (cdr chars) (cons 'oplus (append (flush) acc)) '()))
            ((char=? c #\⊗) (loop (cdr chars) (cons 'otimes (append (flush) acc)) '()))
            (else (loop (cdr chars) acc (cons c cur))))))))

(define tokens (tokenize expr-str))
(length tokens)

;; Now parse: expr = number | ( expr OP expr )
(define (parse tokens)
  (define (p toks)
    (let ((t (car toks)))
      (cond
        ((number? t) (values t (cdr toks)))
        ((eq? t 'lp)
         (let-values (((a r1) (p (cdr toks))))
           (let ((op (car r1)))
             (let-values (((b r2) (p (cdr r1))))
               (let ((rp (car r2)))
                 (if (not (eq? rp 'rp)) (error "expected rp"))
                 (values
                  (cond ((eq? op 'oplus) (min a b))
                        ((eq? op 'otimes) (+ a b))
                        (else (error "bad op")))
                  (cdr r2)))))))
        (else (error "unexpected token" t)))))
  (let-values (((v rest) (p tokens)))
    v))

(parse tokens)

(define (o* a b) (+ a b))

            c1 c2 c3 c4 d1 d2 d3 d4)
  (S (N (L a1 a2 a3 a4) (L b1 b2 b3 b4))
     (N (L c1 c2 c3 c4) (L d1 d2 d3 d4))))

;; Level-3 block: B2 ⊗ B2  call B3

;; Level-4 block: B3 ⊕ B3

        (B2 88 4 72 17  69 1 66 65    50 38 18 16  13 47 19 52))
      (S
        (B2 31 90 93 41  22 95 31 14   99 71 8 52   75 70 35 8)
        (B2 61 30 64 36  18 5 51 13    57 54 54 60  87 48 24 98)))

;; Recursive-descent parser for fully parenthesized (E op E) or integer.
(define pos 0)
(define src expr-str)

(define (peek) (string-ref src pos))
(define (advance) (set! pos (+ pos 1)))
(define (skip-ws) 
  (let loop ()
    (if (and (< pos (string-length src)) (char=? (peek) #\space))
        (begin (advance) (loop)))))

(define (parse-int)
  (let loop ((acc 0))
    (if (and (< pos (string-length src))
             (char-numeric? (peek)))
        (begin 
          (let ((d (- (char->integer (peek)) (char->integer #\0))))
            (advance)
            (loop (+ (* acc 10) d))))
        acc)))

(define (parse-expr)
  (skip-ws)
  (if (char=? (peek) #\()
      (begin
        (advance)  ; (
        (let ((left (parse-expr)))
          (skip-ws)
          (let ((op (peek)))
            (advance)  ; op
            (let ((right (parse-expr)))
              (skip-ws)
              (advance)  ; )
              (cond ((char=? op #\+) (min left right))
                    ((char=? op #\*) (+ left right))
                    (else (error "bad op")))))))
      (parse-int)))

(parse-expr)

;; Parser: each expression is either a number, or ( expr op expr )
(define (parse toks)
  ;; returns (value . rest)
  (let ((t (car toks)))
    (cond
     ((number? t) (cons t (cdr toks)))
     ((eq? t 'lp)
      (let* ((r1 (parse (cdr toks)))
             (v1 (car r1))
             (rest1 (cdr r1))
             (op (car rest1))
             (r2 (parse (cdr rest1)))
             (v2 (car r2))
             (rest2 (cdr r2)))
        ;; rest2 should start with rp
        (unless (eq? (car rest2) 'rp) (error "expected rp"))
        (cons (cond ((eq? op 'oplus) (min v1 v2))
                    ((eq? op 'otimes) (+ v1 v2))
                    (else (error "bad op")))
              (cdr rest2))))
     (else (error "unexpected token")))))

(define result (parse toks))
(car result)

;; Parse infix expression: (a OP b) where OP is ⊕ or ⊗ or operand is nested/number
;; Tokenize: (, ), number, ⊕, ⊗
(define (tokenize s)
  (let loop ((i 0) (tokens '()))
    (if (>= i (string-length s))
        (reverse tokens)
        (let ((c (string-ref s i)))
          (cond
            ((char=? c #\space) (loop (+ i 1) tokens))
            ((char=? c #\() (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'lparen tokens)))
            ((char=? c #\)) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'rparen tokens)))
            ((char=? c #\⊕) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'oplus tokens)))
            ((char=? c #\⊗) (loop (+ i 1) (cons 'otimes tokens)))
            ((char-numeric? c)
             (let scan ((j i))
               (if (and (< j (string-length s)) (char-numeric? (string-ref s j)))
                   (scan (+ j 1))
                   (loop j (cons (string->number (substring s i j)) tokens)))))
            (else (error "bad char" c)))))))

(define toks (tokenize expr-str))
(length toks)

;; Parse: expr = number | ( expr OP expr )
(define (parse toks)
  (cond
    ((number? (car toks)) (values (car toks) (cdr toks)))
    ((eq? (car toks) 'lparen)
     (let-values (((left rest1) (parse (cdr toks))))
       (let ((op (car rest1)))
         (let-values (((right rest2) (parse (cdr rest1))))
           (if (not (eq? (car rest2) 'rparen)) (error "expected rparen"))
           (let ((result (if (eq? op 'oplus) (min left right) (+ left right))))
             (values result (cdr rest2)))))))
    (else (error "bad token" (car toks)))))

(let-values (((v rest) (parse toks)))
  (list 'value v 'remaining (length rest)))

(define (tokenize s)
  (let loop ((i 0) (tokens '()) (cur '()))
    (define (flush)
      (if (null? cur) tokens
          (cons (list->string (reverse cur)) tokens)))
    (if (>= i (string-length s))
        (reverse (flush))
        (let ((c (string-ref s i)))
          (cond
            ((char=? c #\space) (loop (+ i 1) (flush) '()))
            ((char=? c #\() (loop (+ i 1) (cons "(" (flush)) '()))
            ((char=? c #\)) (loop (+ i 1) (cons ")" (flush)) '()))
            ;; ⊕ is multibyte UTF-8: 0xE2 0x8A 0x95, ⊗ is 0xE2 0x8A 0x97
            ((= (char->integer c) #xE2)

                 ((and (= b2 #x8A) (= b3 #x97))
                  (loop (+ i 3) (cons "*" (flush)) '())))))
            (else (loop (+ i 1) tokens (cons c cur)))))))

(define (tokenize s)
  (let loop ((i 0) (tokens '()) (cur '()))
    (if (>= i (string-length s))
        (reverse (if (null? cur) tokens (cons (list->string (reverse cur)) tokens)))
        (let* ((c (string-ref s i))
               (flushed (if (null? cur) tokens (cons (list->string (reverse cur)) tokens))))
          (cond
            ((char=? c #\space) (loop (+ i 1) flushed '()))
            ((char=? c #\() (loop (+ i 1) (cons "LP" flushed) '()))
            ((char=? c #\)) (loop (+ i 1) (cons "RP" flushed) '()))
            ((= (char->integer c) #xE2)
             (let ((b2 (char->integer (string-ref s (+ i 1))))
                   (b3 (char->integer (string-ref s (+ i 2)))))
               (cond
                 ((and (= b2 #x8A) (= b3 #x95))
                  (loop (+ i 3) (cons "MIN" flushed) '()))
                 ((and (= b2 #x8A) (= b3 #x97))
                  (loop (+ i 3) (cons "PLS" flushed) '())))))
            (else (loop (+ i 1) tokens (cons c cur))))))))
(define tokens (tokenize s))
(length tokens)

;; Recursive descent parser. Grammar: expr = NUMBER | LP expr OP expr RP
(define toks tokens)
(define (peek) (car toks))
(define (pop!) (let ((x (car toks))) (set! toks (cdr toks)) x))
(define (parse)
  (let ((t (peek)))
    (cond
      ((string=? t "LP")
       (pop!)
       (let* ((left (parse))
              (op (pop!))
              (right (parse)))
         (unless (string=? (pop!) "RP") (error "expected RP"))
         (if (string=? op "MIN")
             (min left right)
             (+ left right))))
      (else
       (pop!)
       (string->number t)))))
(parse)
